## Track type

Single track with its segment list, discriminated by [MediaType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type Track = {
    bandwidth: number;
    segments: Segment[];
} & ({
    type: MediaType.VIDEO;
    width: number;
    height: number;
} | {
    type: MediaType.AUDIO;
});
```
**References:** [Segment](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.segment)<!-- -->, [MediaType.VIDEO](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->, [MediaType.AUDIO](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)
